purpose: Generate item icons for character merchandise records that are now part of the item catalog.
style: ultra-cartoony magical fantasy game item icon, playful, colorful, exaggerated, collectible, clearly non-realistic, solid pure green #00FF00 background, no text, no labels, no frames, no shadows outside the object, generous crop-safe padding
